requireLink.title: Tracking link required
requireLink.description: This page needs a valid tracking link. Check the link in your confirmation email.

invalidLink.title: Tracking link expired or invalid
invalidLink.description: This tracking link is no longer valid. If you have an account, sign in to see your order.

mismatch.title: Order not found
mismatch.description: This tracking link doesn't match the order in the URL.

terminal: This order is complete. Thanks for ordering with us.
